package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for sql_query_text_asserted_in_handler_tests: SQL-shape assertions written at handler level instead of repository tests.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule192NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule192NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule192NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario192Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule192NegativeService, input Rule192NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
